title: Pesayum Esaya Lyrics Ul Kuthu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Pesayum Esaya Song Lyrics From Ul Kuthu
Singer(s): Vandana Srinivasan
Lyricist: Vivek

aasa aasa aasa
avan meesa mela aasa
kuththaama
koda pudikkum

meesa pattu koosa
avan veesum
oththa osa
nikkaama mazhai
adikkum

Sodi pottu pona
oru kodi kannu
meyum.
annaala nenaikka
vachchaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pesayum Esaya'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Ul Kuthu'?

This song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of 'Pesayum Esaya'?

The song is sung by Vandhana Srinivasan, known for her melodious voice.

Who composed the music for 'Pesayum Esaya'?

The music is composed by Justin Prabhakaran, who is known for his unique sound in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Pesayum Esaya' released?

The song was released on August 30, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pesayum Esaya, the protagonist expresses his feelings of love and admiration through heartfelt lyrics that resonate with the listener. The song's soothing melody, crafted by Justin Prabhakaran, enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it perfect for intimate moments. Vandhana Srinivasan's captivating vocals bring the emotions to life, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Overall, this song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance in the film Ul Kuthu.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pesayum Esaya from Ul Kuthu is a melodious gem that captures the essence of romance and longing. With Vandhana Srinivasan's enchanting vocals and Vivek's heartfelt lyrics, this song creates a soothing atmosphere perfect for intimate moments. Experience the magic of Justin Prabhakaran's music that beautifully complements the emotional depth of the lyrics.
stanzaMeanings: The one who speaks is listening to my heart. The one who is charming is holding my hand.
The one who is playful is taking life and making it sweet. She is stealing beauty.
Showing off her hair, she asks me to look and see.
For the gathering of souls, a breeze has been set.
The one who speaks is listening to my heart. The one who is charming is holding my hand.
The one who is playful is taking life and making it sweet. She is stealing beauty.
Desires, desires, desires; he has a wish on his mustache that he will fulfill.
With a mustache and a broom, he will sweep away the rain without stopping.
In my family, he has broken the sky; he has stirred my heart.
It is a matter of thought. My mouth is like a demon's.
The one who speaks is listening to my heart. The one who is charming is holding my hand.
The one who is playful is taking life and making it sweet. She is stealing beauty.
With a beautiful eye, a beautiful gaze has been placed. Because of that, he is thinking.
Every day, he has set his thoughts in a mirror that reflects his true feelings.
He has taken away the dance and has made it a beautiful rhythm.
It is a matter of thought. My mouth ...
